title: Work schedule improvement ideas

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new Work Schedule is a very nice and useful feature when using the workload widget. I put in all the stat holidays and the days where I know the company is closed, so that nothing gets booked on those days.
It would be very nice if it was spread on all other calendar views.
The Work Schedule is based on teams.
So it would be nice if monday would create an “all users” team, that would by default contain all people in the account. This feature already exists when looking at the teams, but it is not usable as a real team. It would simplify a lot the use of Work Schedule, at least for those like me who put only the stat holidays in it.
Thanks
Franck
